form.formComment: Back from a three-and-a-half months spell and last resumed over 320m at Wagga where she was in the placings, finishing third. Leading chance on best form.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 1 over 457m at this track behind Blazing Turbo beaten 6 lengths (26.02). Has a superb 18.55 best time at this course and distance. Big chance.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (19.61) in a Grade 5, finishing a 9 length sixth. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (20.28) over 340m at Gunnedah. Drawn awkwardly. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running and set it up early last time, clocking 20.15 with a nose win at Gunnedah over 340m and making it back to back wins. Can bring up a hat-trick.
